mapper.select: SELECT SITE_CD AS siteCd , SITE_NM AS siteNm , SITE_DESC AS siteDesc , USE_YN AS useYn , TO_CHAR(CRT_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS crtAt FROM CMS_SITE ORDER BY CRT_AT DESC

SELECT SITE_CD AS siteCd , SITE_NM AS siteNm , SITE_DESC AS siteDesc , USE_YN AS useYn , TO_CHAR(CRT_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS crtAt , CRT_BY AS crtBy , TO_CHAR(UPD_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updAt , UPD_BY AS updBy FROM CMS_SITE WHERE SITE_CD = #{siteCd}

SELECT SITE_CD AS siteCd , SN AS sn , USE_YN AS useYn , IP_DESC AS ipDesc , PERM_IP AS permIp , USE_ST_YMD AS useStYmd , USE_END_YMD AS useEndYmd FROM CMS_SITE_IP WHERE SITE_CD = #{siteCd} ORDER BY CRT_AT DESC

SELECT SITE_CD AS siteCd , SN AS sn , USE_YN AS useYn , IP_DESC AS ipDesc , PERM_IP AS permIp , USE_ST_YMD AS useStYmd , USE_END_YMD AS useEndYmd , TO_CHAR(CRT_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS crtAt , CRT_BY AS crtBy , TO_CHAR(UPD_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updAt , UPD_BY AS updBy FROM CMS_SITE_IP WHERE SITE_CD = #{siteCd} AND SN = #{sn}
